name: Smoked Salmon Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Plus 3 tbsp grated parmesan ch
recipeInstructions:
1. Place cream cheese, eggs, and heavy cream in a bowl of an electric mixer. Beat until smooth.
2. Butter a springform cake pan.
3. Combine bread crumbs and 1/4 cup grated parmesan. Shake the mixture around the bottom and sides of the pan to coat evenly.
4. Cook onions and peppers in butter until tender.
5. Cut smoked salmon into small pieces.
6. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
7. Stir together salmon, Swiss cheese, and remaining 3 tablespoons grated parmesan with sautéed onions and peppers. Add salt and pepper to taste.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and gently shake to level the mixture.
9. Place the pan in a slightly larger pan filled with boiling water to a depth of 2 inches.
10. Bake for 1 hour and 40 minutes.
11. Turn off the oven and let the cake sit in the hot oven for 1 hour.
12. Remove the cake from its water bath and place it on a rack to cool for at least 2 hours before unmolding.
13. Remove the sides of the pan and cut the cake into small wedges.
14. Serve on lettuce with a garnish of lemon wedge, cherry tomato, and a sprig of fresh dill. Makes 16 servings.
